tasks.description: Synthesize investment theses and construct a ranked long/short candidate set consistent with valuation, quality, and momentum confirmation rules.

subtasks.description: For each potential long, draft a concise thesis emphasizing durable FCF, margin resilience/expansion, healthy balance sheets, prudent capital allocation, valuation discount vs history/peers, and near-term catalysts (from tool data only).
completion_evidence: Tool get_ticker_fundamental_data returned data with content

subtasks.description: For each potential short, draft a concise thesis focusing on deteriorating fundamentals, negative momentum, fragile balance sheets, valuation premiums without support, and credible downside catalysts.
completion_evidence: Tool get_ticker_fundamental_data returned data with content

subtasks.description: Apply momentum confirmation: require positive 12-1 and positive 3-month for longs; negative 12-1 with negative/flat 3-month for shorts per calculate_ticker_factors outputs. Exclude names failing confirmation unless offset by exceptional catalysts with clear timing.
completion_evidence: Candidate list filtered by momentum confirmation
Tool get_ticker_fundamental_data returned data with content
